privileged_info_summary: The survey is titled 'Consumer Shopping Habits 2025' and contains three question groups: Informed Consent, Shopping Habits, and Demographics. Two key questions are referenced: CONSENT1 (the consent question) and DEMO_INC (annual household income question). All values in the metadata are verified against the setup script which creates this survey synthetically using LimeSurvey's JSON-RPC API. LimeSurvey is a real, open-source survey platform written in PHP, well-established in the research community.
